title: math constants + per-type MIN/MAX/EPSILON
manager: The blessed constants — pi, e, tau — plus per-type MIN/MAX/EPSILON, so a machine can ask "what is the largest int8" or "the float epsilon" as a named value instead of a magic literal it might transcribe wrong. Boundary constants off by one are a classic overflow bug; naming them and deriving them per type removes the guesswork and lets the checker use them too.
cs: pi/e/tau and friends; per-type MIN/MAX/EPSILON; compile-time constants; pairs with overflow (W6.8) and promotion (W6.7).
